overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt running through rural countryside at night. The character traverses rocky hills, agricultural fields with haystacks, and approaches wooden farm structures under an overcast night sky with distinctive teal-green atmospheric lighting.

events.description: distant village lights become visible on the horizon

agents.ego_description: running downhill on rocky terrain toward distant village lights

entered.detail: uneven rocky ground with patches of grass underfoot
low scrub vegetation flanking the path
narrow dirt trail winding down the hillside
dark tree line visible on the horizon
faint orange lights from a distant settlement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rocky hillside at night with the character running downhill along a dirt trail. Sparse scrub vegetation flanks the path while distant forest lines the horizon. Around 8 seconds, village lights become visible in the distance, providing a focal point for the descent.

events.description: terrain transitions from rocky hills to cultivated fields with haystacks

agents.ego_description: running along a path through open agricultural fields

entered.detail: conical haystacks scattered throughout the fields
rows of cultivated crops or cut grass
tall grass fields extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from rocky wilderness into open agricultural farmland. The path continues through fields dotted with haystacks and tall grass. The terrain becomes flatter and more manicured, indicating proximity to rural settlements.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural farm path with wooden fencing

events.description: path enters farm area with wooden fences and outbuildings

agents.ego_description: running past wooden fences and farm outbuildings

entered.detail: rustic wooden post fencing lining the path
wooden barns and farm structures in the distance
thick clusters of trees flanking the farm

segments.scene_description: The path enters a more developed farm area with wooden fencing appearing on the right. Dense trees line the left side while wooden farm buildings become visible ahead. The environment shifts from open fields to a more enclosed rural setting with man-made structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching wooden farmhouse at forest edge

events.description: approaching a lit wooden farmhouse at close range

agents.ego_description: running toward a wooden farmhouse along a narrow forest path

entered.detail: traditional wooden house with lit windows
dense dark forest bordering the farm path

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a wooden farmhouse with lit windows on the left, indicating habitation. The path narrows as it runs along the edge of a dense forest. The wooden fencing recedes into the distance while the immediate surroundings become more enclosed by trees and the prominent farmhouse structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wild, rocky hillside down into a settled rural farmstead under a teal-green night sky. It begins with the character running downhill along a dirt trail flanked by sparse scrub, with distant village lights emerging as a focal point on the horizon. As the descent continues, the rocky wilderness transitions into open agricultural farmland characterized by flat terrain, tall grass, and scattered haystacks. The scene then shifts toward a more developed area where wooden fencing appears and the open fields give way to an enclosed setting lined with dense trees. Finally, the path narrows as it passes a wooden farmhouse with lit windows, moving deeper into the shadow of the forest.
